documents.topic: Clamping init from Int for Cardinal and Tagged Cardinal
rawValue → underlying rename — alignment with upstream Carrier rename
documents.statusDetail: Cohort-wide policy C1 (2026-05-09): Story 1 launches at the current rawValue shape; the rename is scheduled but unscoped for a future major version. The trivial-self-carrier shape (Cardinal.Underlying = Cardinal) is preserved across 0.x for cohort coherence.
